original: Among the annoying challenges facing the middle class is one that will probably go unmentioned in the next presidential campaign: What happens when the robots come for their jobs?
translation_literal: 在中产阶级面临的令人烦恼的挑战之中，有一个可能在下一次总统竞选中不会被提及：当机器人来抢他们的工作时，会发生什么？

chunks.english: Among the annoying challenges facing the middle class is one
chunks.chinese: 在中产阶级面临的令人烦恼的挑战之中有一个

chunks.english: Among the annoying challenges facing the middle class
chunks.chinese: 在中产阶级面临的令人烦恼的挑战之中
chunks.relation: 倒装结构中前置的地点/范围表语

chunks.english: one that will probably go unmentioned in the next presidential campaign
chunks.chinese: 一个可能在下一次总统竞选中不会被提及的问题

chunks.english: that will probably go unmentioned in the next presidential campaign
chunks.chinese: 可能在下一次总统竞选中不会被提及的

chunks.english: What happens when the robots come for their jobs?
chunks.chinese: 当机器人来抢他们的工作时，会发生什么？
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释 one 的具体问题

chunks.english: when the robots come for their jobs
chunks.chinese: 当机器人来抢他们的工作时
chunks.relation: 说明 happens 的时间条件

sentence_patterns.explanation: 介词短语 Among... 位于句首，真正主语是 one。
冒号后的问句解释 one 这个 challenge 的内容。

original: Don’t dismiss that possibility entirely.
translation_literal: 不要完全排除那种可能性。

chunks.chinese: 不要完全排除那种可能性

original: About half of U.S. jobs are at high risk of being automated, according to a University of Oxford study, with the middle class disproportionately squeezed.
translation_literal: 根据牛津大学的一项研究，大约一半的美国工作处于被自动化的高风险之中，而中产阶级受到不成比例的挤压。

chunks.english: at high risk of being automated
chunks.chinese: 被自动化的高风险之中

chunks.english: according to a University of Oxford study
chunks.chinese: 根据牛津大学的一项研究

chunks.english: with the middle class disproportionately squeezed
chunks.chinese: 中产阶级受到不成比例的挤压
chunks.relation: 补充说明自动化风险对中产阶级的影响
with 复合结构中的逻辑主语
with 复合结构中的补足语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主句 + according to... + with 结构
sentence_patterns.explanation: according to... 说明来源，with 结构补充结果影响。

original: Lower-income jobs like gardening or day care don’t appeal to robots.
translation_literal: 像园艺或日托这样的低收入工作对机器人没有吸引力。

chunks.english: Lower-income jobs like gardening or day care
chunks.chinese: 像园艺或日托这样的低收入工作

chunks.relation: 作 appeal to 的宾语

original: But many middle-class occupations — trucking, financial advice, software engineering — have aroused their interest, or soon will.
translation_literal: 但是许多中产阶级职业——卡车运输、金融咨询、软件工程——已经引起了它们的兴趣，或者很快会引起。

chunks.chinese: 卡车运输、金融咨询、软件工程

sentence_patterns.explanation: 破折号中三项列举 middle-class occupations 的例子。
will 后省略 arouse their interest。

original: The rich own the robots, so they will be fine.
translation_literal: 富人拥有机器人，所以他们会没事。

chunks.relation: 作 will be 的表语

sentence_patterns.explanation: so 连接前后两个因果分句，前一分句说明原因，后一分句说明结果。

original: This isn’t to be alarmist.
translation_literal: 这并不是危言耸听。

chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

original: Optimists point out that technological upheaval has benefited workers in the past.
translation_literal: 乐观主义者指出，技术剧变在过去曾使工人受益。

chunks.english: that technological upheaval has benefited workers in the past
chunks.chinese: 技术剧变在过去曾使工人受益
chunks.relation: 作 point out 的宾语

original: The Industrial Revolution didn’t go so well for Luddites whose jobs were displaced by mechanized looms, but it eventually raised living standards and created more jobs than it destroyed.
translation_literal: 工业革命对那些工作被机械化织布机取代的卢德派工人来说并不顺利，但它最终提高了生活水平，并创造了比其摧毁的更多的工作。

chunks.english: The Industrial Revolution didn’t go so well for Luddites whose jobs were displaced by mechanized looms
chunks.chinese: 工业革命对那些工作被机械化织布机取代的卢德派工人来说并不顺利
对卢德派工人来说那么顺利
chunks.relation: 说明 didn’t go 的结果/对象

chunks.english: whose jobs were displaced by mechanized looms
chunks.chinese: 其工作被机械化织布机取代的

chunks.english: but it eventually raised living standards and created more jobs than it destroyed
chunks.chinese: 但它最终提高了生活水平，并创造了比其摧毁的更多工作

sentence_patterns.explanation: but 后两个谓语 raised 和 created 并列，形成历史经验对比。

original: Likewise, automation should eventually boost productivity, stimulate demand by driving down prices, and free workers from hard, boring work.
translation_literal: 同样，自动化最终应会提高生产率，通过压低价格刺激需求，并把工人从艰苦、乏味的工作中解放出来。

chunks.relation: 说明 stimulate demand 的方式

sentence_patterns.explanation: 三个谓语并列说明自动化的潜在好处。

original: But in the medium term, middle-class workers may need a lot of help adjusting.
translation_literal: 但是在中期，中产阶级工人可能需要大量帮助来适应。

original: The first step, as Erik Brynjolfsson and Andrew McAfee argue in The Second Machine Age, should be rethinking education and job training.
translation_literal: 第一步，正如埃里克·布林约尔松和安德鲁·麦卡菲在《第二次机器时代》中所论证的，应当是重新思考教育和职业培训。

chunks.english: as Erik Brynjolfsson and Andrew McAfee argue in The Second Machine Age
chunks.chinese: 正如埃里克·布林约尔松和安德鲁·麦卡菲在《第二次机器时代》中所论证的

chunks.english: as Erik Brynjolfsson and Andrew McAfee argue

chunks.chinese: 重新思考教育和职业培训
chunks.relation: 作 should be 的表语

sentence_patterns.explanation: as 引导插入语说明观点出处，主干是 The first step should be rethinking...。
as 表示“正如”，引出引用来源。

original: Curriculums — from grammar school to college — should evolve to focus less on memorizing facts and more on creativity and complex communication.
translation_literal: 课程体系——从小学到大学——应当发展为少关注记忆事实，而更多关注创造力和复杂沟通。

chunks.english: to focus less on memorizing facts and more on creativity and complex communication
chunks.chinese: 以便少关注记忆事实，而更多关注创造力和复杂沟通

chunks.english: more on creativity and complex communication
chunks.chinese: 更多关注创造力和复杂沟通

sentence_patterns.explanation: from grammar school to college 插入说明 Curriculums 的覆盖范围。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: less on A and more on B

original: Vocational schools should do a better job of fostering problem-solving skills and helping students work alongside robots.
translation_literal: 职业学校应当更好地培养解决问题的技能，并帮助学生与机器人一起工作。

chunks.english: a better job of fostering problem-solving skills and helping students work alongside robots
chunks.chinese: 更好地培养解决问题技能并帮助学生与机器人一起工作
帮助学生与机器人一起工作

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: of doing A and helping B
sentence_patterns.explanation: a better job of 后两个动作并列。

original: Online education can supplement the traditional kind.
translation_literal: 在线教育可以补充传统教育。

original: It could make extra training and instruction affordable.
translation_literal: 它可以使额外培训和教学变得负担得起。

chunks.relation: 补充说明 training and instruction 的状态

original: Professionals trying to acquire new skills will be able to do so without going into debt.
translation_literal: 试图获得新技能的专业人士将能够在不负债的情况下做到这一点。

chunks.english: Professionals trying to acquire new skills
chunks.chinese: 试图获得新技能的专业人士

chunks.relation: 说明 do so 的方式/代价

original: The challenge of coping with automation underlines the need for the U.S. to revive its fading business dynamism: Starting new companies must be made easier.
translation_literal: 应对自动化的挑战突显出美国重振其正在衰退的商业活力的必要性：创办新公司必须变得更容易。

chunks.english: The challenge of coping with automation
the need for the U.S. to revive its fading business dynamism
chunks.chinese: 美国重振其正在衰退的商业活力的必要性

chunks.english: for the U.S. to revive its fading business dynamism
chunks.chinese: 美国重振其正在衰退的商业活力的

chunks.english: Starting new companies must be made easier
chunks.chinese: 创办新公司必须变得更容易
chunks.relation: 冒号后解释 revive business dynamism 的具体做法
补充说明 Starting new companies 的状态

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 抽象名词 + 冒号解释
sentence_patterns.explanation: 冒号后解释 revive business dynamism 的具体方向。

original: In previous eras of drastic technological change, entrepreneurs smoothed the transition by dreaming up ways to combine labor and machines.
translation_literal: 在以前的剧烈技术变革时代，企业家通过想出把劳动力和机器结合起来的方法，使转型变得平稳。

chunks.english: In previous eras of drastic technological change
chunks.chinese: 在以前的剧烈技术变革时代

chunks.english: by dreaming up ways to combine labor and machines
chunks.chinese: 通过想出把劳动力和机器结合起来的方法
把劳动力和机器结合起来的

original: The best uses of 3D printers and virtual reality haven’t been invented yet.
translation_literal: 3D 打印机和虚拟现实的最佳用途尚未被发明出来。

chunks.english: The best uses of 3D printers and virtual reality
chunks.chinese: 3D 打印机和虚拟现实的最佳用途

original: The U.S. needs the new companies that will invent them.
translation_literal: 美国需要将会发明它们的新公司。

chunks.english: the new companies that will invent them
chunks.chinese: 将会发明它们的新公司

chunks.relation: 作 invent 的宾语，指最佳用途

original: Finally, because automation threatens to widen the gap between capital income and labor income, taxes and the safety net will have to be rethought.
translation_literal: 最后，因为自动化威胁要扩大资本收入和劳动收入之间的差距，税收和安全网将不得不被重新思考。

chunks.english: because automation threatens to widen the gap between capital income and labor income
chunks.chinese: 因为自动化威胁要扩大资本收入和劳动收入之间的差距

chunks.english: the gap between capital income and labor income
chunks.chinese: 资本收入和劳动收入之间的差距

sentence_patterns.explanation: 主句主语由 taxes 和 safety net 两项并列构成。

original: Taxes on low-wage labor need to be cut, and wage subsidies such as the earned income tax credit should be expanded: This would boost incomes, encourage work, reward companies for job creation, and reduce inequality.
translation_literal: 低工资劳动的税收需要被削减，而诸如劳动所得税抵免这样的工资补贴应当扩大：这会提高收入、鼓励工作、奖励创造就业的公司，并减少不平等。

chunks.english: Taxes on low-wage labor need to be cut
chunks.chinese: 低工资劳动的税收需要被削减

chunks.english: wage subsidies such as the earned income tax credit should be expanded
chunks.chinese: 诸如劳动所得税抵免这样的工资补贴应当扩大

chunks.english: wage subsidies such as the earned income tax credit
chunks.chinese: 诸如劳动所得税抵免这样的工资补贴

chunks.english: This would boost incomes, encourage work, reward companies for job creation, and reduce inequality
chunks.chinese: 这会提高收入、鼓励工作、奖励创造就业的公司，并减少不平等

chunks.relation: 解释分句主语，指前面的政策组合

chunks.chinese: 会提高 / 鼓励 / 奖励 / 减少
收入 / 工作 / 公司 / 不平等

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A need..., and B should...: This would V1, V2, V3, and V4
sentence_patterns.explanation: 前半两个政策并列，冒号后四个效果并列。
This 指代前面的税收和补贴政策。

original: Technology will improve society in ways big and small over the next few years, yet this will be little comfort to those who find their lives and careers upended by automation.
translation_literal: 未来几年，技术将以大大小小的方式改善社会，然而这对那些发现自己的生活和职业被自动化颠覆的人来说几乎没有安慰。

chunks.english: Technology will improve society in ways big and small over the next few years
chunks.chinese: 未来几年，技术将以大大小小的方式改善社会

chunks.english: in ways big and small over the next few years
chunks.chinese: 在未来几年以大大小小的方式
chunks.relation: 说明 improve 的方式和时间

chunks.english: yet this will be little comfort to those who find their lives and careers upended by automation
chunks.chinese: 然而这对那些发现自己的生活和职业被自动化颠覆的人来说几乎没有安慰

chunks.english: little comfort to those who find their lives and careers upended by automation
chunks.chinese: 对那些发现生活和职业被自动化颠覆的人来说几乎没有安慰
chunks.relation: 作 will be 的表语

chunks.english: who find their lives and careers upended by automation
chunks.chinese: 发现自己的生活和职业被自动化颠覆的

chunks.relation: 补充说明 lives and careers 的状态

sentence_patterns.explanation: yet 连接改善社会和对受害者无慰藉的转折。

original: Destroying the machines that are coming for our jobs would be nuts.
translation_literal: 摧毁那些正在来抢我们工作的机器会是疯狂的。

chunks.english: Destroying the machines that are coming for our jobs
chunks.chinese: 摧毁那些正在来抢我们工作的机器

chunks.english: that are coming for our jobs

chunks.relation: 作 would be 的表语

original: But policies to help workers adapt will be indispensable.
translation_literal: 但是帮助工人适应的政策将不可或缺。

chunks.relation: 作 will be 的表语
